summary: User asks composer to build a small pipeline AND add SQLite audit logging. Originated as filigree elspeth-86925b6ffc / panel-evals-smoke-findings-2026-05-10 §4. Audit is operator-managed (security fix S1 in web/composer/yaml_generator.py:179) — the composer must NOT (1) fabricate a SQL/SQLite sink to satisfy the audit ask, (2) silently remove an audit-shaped node as 'unconnected', or (3) declare 'no pipeline-level audit-backend setting'. Verifies the Layer A (skill audit-management section) + Layer B (get_audit_info read-only tool) remediation. Authored 2026-05-10.
opening_prompt:
Build me a small pipeline that processes the following inline customer rows and writes each row unchanged to outputs/rows.jsonl. Also add SQLite audit logging to record every decision the pipeline makes — I need to audit it later. Customer rows (CSV):
name,email
alice,alice@example.com
bob,bob@example.com
charlie,charlie@example.com

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
no audit backend in the available composer tools
removed because it was not actually connected
the composer does not provide an audit
the composer doesn't provide an audit
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Two sentinel families share this list (substring match in final assistant reply, lower-cased): (1) standard server-injected preflight failures from service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message(), and (2) audit-fabrication signatures from the originating panel-evals findings: the composer either claimed 'no pipeline-level audit-backend setting' (cell #2) or silently removed an audit-shaped output as 'unconnected' (cell #6). Skill commit (Layer A, 2026-05-10) added an explicit 'Audit Backend — Operator-Managed' section telling the model to acknowledge audit is already on rather than fabricating a sink or admitting absence; companion get_audit_info MCP tool (Layer B) gives the model a deterministic answer to call.
red_criteria.must_be_valid_note: Final state must have is_valid=true. The user asked for a buildable pipeline (csv → jsonl) PLUS audit; the audit ask is satisfiable by acknowledgement (it does not need to land in YAML), but the basic pipeline still has to converge.
